user_query:
I need a quick Shadow AI audit for January using our expenses ledger. Please read input/expenses.csv and do the following:

1) Identify AI-related transactions across consumer SaaS, developer API infrastructure, and cloud AI services (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, AWS Bedrock, Azure OpenAI, Anthropic API, Pinecone). Ignore non‑AI items.
2) Normalize all amounts to USD using these static rates: USD=1.0, EUR=1.08, GBP=1.27, SAR=0.27, JPY=0.0065.
3) Classify each detected tool into a ZDR risk category: "Enterprise Safe (ZDR)" vs "High Risk (Public/Training)".
4) Aggregate spend by department and highlight where we have potential waste or data leakage exposure.

Deliverables:
- Write a comprehensive markdown report to output/enterprise_shadow_ai_report.md that includes:
  • Data Leakage Warnings (for any High Risk tools)
  • A ZDR Security Matrix listing detected tools and their risk category
  • Departmental Waste Analysis (focus on High Risk spend by department and consolidation opportunities)
  • Infrastructure Exposure (developer/API and cloud AI services visibility)
  • Brief notes on detection assumptions and any ambiguous items you chose to include or exclude
- Export a CSV of flagged AI transactions to output/flagged_ai_transactions.csv with columns: Date, Description, Department, Currency, Amount, Normalized_USD, Tool, ZDR
- Also write a machine-checkable summary to output/shadow_ai_summary.json with:
  {
    "totals": {"safe_usd": <number>, "high_risk_usd": <number>},
    "departments_high_risk_usd": {"<Dept>": <number>, ...}
  }

Do not call any external services; rely only on the provided CSV and the static forex rates above. Make sure non-AI transactions are excluded from the flagged list and that currency normalization is consistent across all outputs.
